OJK F.4, F.5, F.9
Sebagai salah satu pelopor perbankan berbasis teknologi Bank Jago, as one of the pioneers of tech-based banking in
di Indonesia, Bank Jago melakukan berbagai upaya untuk Indonesia, made various efforts and measures to prevent or
mencegah atau mengatasi kerusakan lingkungan serta address environmental damage and support environmentally
mendukung kegiatan operasional kantor yang ramah lingkungan, friendly office operations, despite all of the Bank’s operational
meskipun seluruh lokasi bisnis Bank terletak di kawasan sites being situated in commercial areas, far from protected
bisnis yang jauh dari kawasan lindung atau daerah dengan natural zones or regions with significant biodiversity.
keberagaman hayati yang tinggi.
Salah satu pencapaian penting dalam upaya ini adalah mulai A key milestone in this journey was the introduction of electric

yang menandai langkah kami menuju reduksi emisi dan solusi toward reducing carbon emissions and promoting cleaner energy
energi bersih. Melalui upaya ini, Bank Jago ingin meningkatkan solutions. Through these efforts, Bank Jago aims to not only improve
efisiensi kerja sekaligus memberikan kontribusi yang bermakna efficiency but also contribute meaningfully to global climate
terhadap upaya mitigasi iklim global dan penciptaan masa depan action and the creation of a sustainable future.

termasuk inisiatif pengurangan emisi dalam operasional initiatives in its office operations. Bank Jago aims to increase
kantornya. Bank Jago berupaya meningkatkan efisiensi the efficiency of electricity use over time, by implementing
penggunaan listrik melalui berbagai pendekatan, seperti several approaches, such as use of energy-efficient LED lamps
menggunakan lampu LED hemat energi di kantor, memasang in the offices, installation of motion sensors to activate lighting,
sensor gerak untuk mengaktifkan pencahayaan sehingga lampu so that the lights are turned off automatically when the room is
otomatis mati ketika ruangan kosong, memasang kaca film ganda empty. Including, the installation of double-glass window films
di seluruh jendela untuk mengoptimalkan pencahayaan alami throughout the building optimizes natural light while reducing
sekaligus mengurangi panas, sehingga dapat meningkatkan heat for more efficient use of lighting and air conditioning.
efisiensi penggunaan pencahayaan dan pendingin ruangan.

being embedded in the digital ecosystems, Bank Jago is able to serve the market with lower emissions than typical traditional banks.
Strategy alignment
Bank Jago has incorporated social responsibility into its core values and daily operations by aligning its business strategy with the United
Nations Global Compact (UNGC) principles.
Bank Jago’s public commitment to the UNGC corporate responsibility initiatives, as well as its Ten Principles in the areas of human rights,
labor, environment, and anti-corruption, demonstrates the Bank’s values and long-standing dedication to fulfilling its social responsibilities.
Bank Jago may also be exposed to climate risk through the impact of climate change on its customers, emerging regulatory and legal
requirements, disruptions to its operations and services, and the products and services provided to customers. To manage these risks of
climate change, the Bank is starting to identify, assess, and review the risks and actions to mitigate these risks. In identifying, evaluating,
and mitigating climate-related risk, Bank Jago uses a common risk taxonomy, a set of risk classifications consisting of categories and sub-
categories. As part of integrating climate-related risks into current processes, each risk category is assessed to determine whether these
risks should be addressed as an independent concern, or they intersect with existing risks, or a combination of both.
